name: link
description: Pressable text link with size presets and underline variants (none, hover, always).

props.name: children
props.description: The text content of the link

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset that maps to text variants (caption, body, bodyLarge)

props.name: underline
props.description: Controls when the underline decoration is shown

props.name: color
props.description: Custom color override; defaults to primary theme color

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables press interaction and applies disabled text color

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Link onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Details')} icon="→">
  View details
</Link>
// External link via href
<Link href="https://example.com" external>Visit our website</Link>
// No underline variant
<Link underline="none" bold onPress={handleTermsPress}>
  Terms & Conditions
</Link>

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// Small caption-size link in a form footer
<Link size="sm" onPress={openForgotPassword}>Forgot password?</Link>

examples.label: Example 3
Example 4
examples.code:
// Custom colour for a link inside a dark card
<Link color={theme.colors.onPrimary} href="https://docs.example.com" external>
  Read the docs
</Link>
